title: Explain magic constant 8 for pub_id display truncation
description: Files: tui/src/app.rs lines 207-208, tui/src/event.rs line 1242 — pub_ids are truncated to 8 characters in display_name() and payment ID display. Why 8? Is it a balance between ambiguity risk and readability, or does it have cryptographic significance? Document at the usage site so future contributors understand the intent.
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
